tier_1_linters.rationale: Pure Python lints, no LLM calls. No budget needed.

tier_2_smoke.scope: Judge-calibration drift smoke. 10 sampled rubrics × 2 calibration samples (1 good + 1 bad) = 20 judge calls. Each call scores a known-graded sample and verifies the judge stays within ±0.5 of the encoded score. ~10–20K tokens with Haiku.
tier_2_smoke.rationale: Detects rubric drift, judge-model drift, and sample drift. Sample-based smoke per critique R1 fix. Full Tier 3 behavioral coverage is planned but not yet shipped.

tier_3_per_skill.rationale: Per-skill behavioral eval: executor (Sonnet) + judge (Haiku) + blind-comparator. Sonnet judge override raises ceiling to 60K soft / 150K hard.

tier_3_full_suite.rationale: /eval --all release-gate run. Sanity ceiling on Max-subscription rate-limit consumption per single command.

override_to_sonnet_when: rubric explicitly marked judge_model: sonnet in case JSON

ralf_session_aggregate.$comment: Round 6 HIGH-3 fix. Eval framework respects userConfig session-aggregate caps when running RALF inside an eval case.

blind_comparator.$comment: Round 3 Q3 fix. Mechanism is instruction-based suppression in isolated subagent (NOT skills: [] in frontmatter).

calibration.$comment: Round 4 N5 + Round 6 HIGH-1 + Round 14 HIGH-A: alpha.16 ships the full 102-sample target (3 good + 3 bad per rubric × 17 rubrics).
